revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23524127410|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= {{Fix | link = Wikipedia:Citing sources | title = This citation requires a reference to the specific page or range of pages in which the material appears | text = pages needed | date = {{{date|}}} | cat-date = Category:Wikipedia articles needing page number citations }} }}<noinclude> <!--Categories and interwikis go on the /doc sub-page.--> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= {{Fix | link = Wikipedia:Citing sources | title = This citation requires a reference to the specific page or range of pages in which the material appears | text = pages needed | date = {{{date|}}} | cat-date = Category:Wikipedia articles needing page number citations }} }}<noinclude> <!--Categories and interwikis go on the /doc sub-page.--> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24957526818|time triggered pipeline]]
